abilities.description: Put a lore counter on target Saga you control or remove one from it. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.)

effect.description: Put a lore counter on target Saga you control or remove one from it. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.)
effect.name: AddOrRemoveCounter

triggers.description: Whenever you put a lore counter on a Saga you control, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one other target creature.
